name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Protect your eyes in style with these premium UV400 sunglasses. Featuring polarized lenses that block 100% of UVA and UVB rays, lightweight titanium frames, and scratch-resistant coating. Perfect for beach days, outdoor sports, and everyday summer wear.

name: Floral Maxi Dress
description: Flow through summer in this gorgeous floral maxi dress. Made from 100% breathable cotton with a flattering wrap-style silhouette. Features adjustable tie waist, flutter sleeves, and a vibrant tropical print. Machine washable and wrinkle-resistant.

name: SPF 50+ Sunscreen Lotion
description: Broad-spectrum SPF 50+ protection in a lightweight, non-greasy formula. Water-resistant for up to 80 minutes — perfect for swimming and outdoor activities. Enriched with vitamin E and aloe vera to nourish and hydrate skin. Fragrance-free and dermatologist tested.

name: Inflatable Beach Lounger
description: Kick back in ultimate comfort with this self-inflating air lounger. No pump needed — just open and wave it through the air to fill in seconds. Durable 210T ripstop nylon construction holds up to 440 lbs. Folds into a compact carry bag for easy transport.

name: Tropical Print Swimsuit
description: Make a splash in this vibrant tropical print one-piece swimsuit. Chlorine-resistant fabric retains its shape and color wash after wash. Features UPF 50+ protection, adjustable straps, and a flattering underwire bust. Available in sizes XS–XXL.

name: Wide-Brim Straw Hat
description: Shield yourself from the sun with this classic wide-brim straw hat. Natural raffia weave provides breathable sun protection while the adjustable inner band ensures a perfect fit. Packable design springs back to shape after travel. Pairs perfectly with any beach outfit.

name: Waterproof Beach Bag
description: The ultimate beach companion. This XL waterproof tote fits towels, sunscreen, snacks and more. Features a wet/dry inner compartment, insulated cooler pocket, sand-proof mesh exterior, and a matching waterproof pouch for your phone and keys.

name: Aloe Vera After-Sun Gel
description: Cool and soothe sun-exposed skin instantly with this 99% pure aloe vera gel. Lightweight, fast-absorbing formula reduces redness, hydrates deeply, and promotes healing. Also works as a hair hydrator and after-shave soother. Paraben-free and vegan.
